ADDED TO LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR Defendant'S Ex Parte Motion For Stay Of Execution
Off Calendar Dec-07-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Fafa Chan, Defendant Propria Persona
Jonathan Seigel, Esq., Attorney for Plaintiff Lem/Ray Properties
RULING:
Defendant Chan's Ex Parte Motion For Stay Of Execution: The Court grants a stay of execution to 12/14/04; absent good cause, no further stays will be granted.
By stipulation, order shortenting time is granted. Defendant Chan's Motion For Permanent Stay Pending Appeal is CALENDARED for 12/14/04 at 8:30 AM in Dept. 210; Defendant shall file and personally serve her motion no later than 10 AM on 12/10/04; opposition shall be filed and personaly served no later than 12 Noon on 12/13/04. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina T. Paxton, CSR #1558

Motion For Stay Of Eviction & Application & Declaration For Stay Of Eviction
Off Calendar Nov-16-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT FAFA CHAN'S Motion For Stay Of Eviction: OFF CALENDAR for failure to provide a proof of service on the 9:30 AM calendar, but without prejudice to Defendant moving ex parte for relief during the 11:00 AM ex parte calendar if Defendant properly notified Plaintiff that they are moving ex parte. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
